title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at KPIT Technologies Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at KPIT Technologies Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
KPIT Technologies Digital Technologies has an exciting opening for a Software Engineer at our Vijayawada office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About KPIT Technologies Digital Technologies:
KPIT Technologies Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with KPIT Technologies Digital Technologies!
